'''[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Fuce''' served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He commanded a small garrison of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].
He served the Empire as the base Commander at the garrison established on Dantooine, during the years following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'' {{1st}}
